description.en: Unregister a user signal: uninstall the handler of the signum signal installed by register(). Return True if the signal was registered, False otherwise. Not available on Windows.

excerpt.es: Unregister a user signal: uninstall the handler of the signum signal installed by register(). Return True if the signal was registered, False otherwise. Not available on Windows.
